dialogue_hooks.dialogue_text: Jonas Reed keeps his voice low and says the dock is the only place worth checking tonight.
dialogue_hooks.blocked_text: Jonas Reed has said what he will say for now, and he is not ready to explain why yet.

dialogue_hooks.dialogue_text: Jonas Reed loosens his shoulders and repeats that the dock is where the paper trail began.
dialogue_hooks.blocked_text: Jonas Reed has already said what he will say for now.

dialogue_hooks.dialogue_text: Jonas Reed points toward the waterline and admits the broker used the dock to move papers.
dialogue_hooks.blocked_text: Jonas Reed has already said what he will say for now.

dialogue_hooks.dialogue_text: Sister Eliza says the church records mention a dock receipt signed the same night.
dialogue_hooks.blocked_text: Sister Eliza insists the records are not for idle questions.

dialogue_hooks.dialogue_text: Sister Eliza lowers her voice and adds that the receipt was copied into the ledger with care.
dialogue_hooks.blocked_text: Sister Eliza still wants a reason to trust Mara with more.
